name: soundgrid
description: SoundGrid — an open-source, cross-platform soundboard that plays audio clips into your microphone stream (Windows-first).
author: SoundGrid Contributors

scripts.dev:main: wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run build:native && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cross-env-shell electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.pack: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.dist:installer: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:portable: npm run vendor:vb-cable && npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:native && npm run build && electron-builder -m
